description: Recto (probably the secondary use): Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. In the hand of the same supporter of Daniel b. ʿAzarya who also wrote T-S K25.244. Probably related to the Arabic-script petition on the other side. This too is a petition/report presumably sent to a dignitary, asking him not to remain silent in the face of suffering.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
